creator: gspurki@gmail.com
text:
When i start openethereum i get that error:

openethereum --base-path=/openethereum --max-peers=5 --db-compaction=hdd --scale-verifiers
2020-06-26 12:04:01  Starting OpenEthereum/v3.0.1-stable-UNKNOWN-UNKNOWN/x86_64-unknown-freebsd/rustc1.44.1
2020-06-26 12:04:01  Keys path /openethereum/keys/ethereum
2020-06-26 12:04:01  DB path /openethereum/chains/ethereum/db/4e69aec8c
2020-06-26 12:04:01  State DB configuration: fast
2020-06-26 12:04:01  Operating mode: active
2020-06-26 12:04:03  Configured for Ethereum using Ethash engine
2020-06-26 12:04:05  Updated conversion rate to Ξ1 = US$231.53 (20567116 wei/gas)
2020-06-26 12:04:05  Updater is deprecated and may be removed in a future release. Please see #11696 for details:
https://github.com/openethereum/openethereum/issues/11696
2020-06-26 12:04:05  Removed existing file '/openethereum/jsonrpc.ipc'.
2020-06-26 12:04:11  Public node URL: enode://XXX
Segmentation fault (core dumped)

Uname:
FreeBSD frb47 12.1-RELEASE-p6 FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE-p6 GENERIC  amd64
